---
title: "ReparameterisedDistributions.jl"
description: "Alternative parameterisations for Distributions.jl distributions."
categories: [distributions, parameterisation]
---

The natural parameters of a distribution are often not the ones you want to put
a prior on or reason about. ReparameterisedDistributions.jl lets you switch
between parameterisations — for example specifying a distribution by its mean
and standard deviation — while keeping the standard `Distributions.jl`
interface.

This package is early; expect the interface to change.

## Install

```julia
using Pkg
Pkg.add("ReparameterisedDistributions")
```

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/EpiAware/ReparameterisedDistributions.jl)
